title: AutoMaximize
description: Very simple mod to maximize the game when in the title screen.
body:
## Tired of clicking the **maximize** button to play your favorite game ?
Say goodbye to that extra click with **AutoMaximize**.
AutoMaximize is a very simple mod to maximize the game automatically when in the title screen.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Don't worry! It will maximize one time on every game launch.

</details>



---
All versions are pretty much supported, feel free to contribute.  
Found an unsupported version ? Create an issue so I can test it and add it.  
A bug or a feature ? Create an issue on [the Github](https://github.com/Mimexe/minecraft-automaximize/issues/new)
